overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a scenic grassland at dawn. The video features a dramatic transition from blue hour darkness to golden hour sunlight as the character walks through autumn-colored terrain, eventually reaching a turquoise waterfall in a rocky gorge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland at dusk with distant ancient ruins

events.description: scene rapidly transitions from dark blue hour night to bright golden hour daylight

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through tall grass toward distant ruins and a large autumn tree

large tree with orange and red autumn foliage
dark mountain silhouettes framing the horizon
tall golden and red grass covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in near-darkness with the character walking through a grassland at dusk. Ancient ruins stand silhouetted in the distance against a deep blue sky. As the character progresses, the lighting rapidly shifts to bright golden hour, illuminating the autumn colors of the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit grassland with scattered boulders and autumn foliage

events.description: terrain transitions from flat grassland to rocky incline with visible water

agents.ego_description: character walks at steady pace through the golden grass, navigating around large rock formations

entered.detail: large reddish boulders scattered in the grass
vibrant turquoise stream visible in the distance between rocks

segments.scene_description: Bathed in warm golden hour light, the character continues through the grassland passing large rock formations and colorful vegetation. The distant ruins fade from view as the character approaches a rocky area with a distinctive turquoise stream.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky gorge with waterfall and mineral pools

events.description: character stops walking and stands at the edge of the waterfall to observe
character looks upward toward the sun and surrounding cliff faces

agents.ego_description: character stops at the waterfall overlook, looking around at the water and sky, then walks slowly along the cliff edge

entered.detail: cascading waterfall flowing into a turquoise pool with mist rising
steep rock walls surrounding the waterfall gorge
mist rising from the falling water

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a rocky overlook featuring a stunning waterfall cascading into a vibrant turquoise pool. Steam rises from the water as the character stops to observe the scene, looking up at the sun breaking through the clouds. The environment shifts from open grassland to an enclosed rocky gorge with steep cliff faces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim grassland that transforms into a sun-drenched rocky gorge. It begins in near-darkness with the character walking past silhouetted ancient ruins under a deep blue sky, before the lighting rapidly shifts to a bright golden hour that illuminates the autumn colors of the landscape. As the character progresses through the warm light, the ruins fade from view and the open grassland gives way to large rock formations and colorful vegetation. The scene then shifts toward a rocky area with a turquoise stream, finally arriving at an overlook where a waterfall cascades into a vibrant pool. Steam rises from the water as the camera looks up toward the sun breaking through the clouds, enclosed by the steep cliff faces of the gorge.
